paper_metadata.subject_name: Basics of Electrical and Electronics Engineering

subparts.text: Explain Kirchoffs first and second law
Draw the equivalent circuit of practical voltage and current source
Prove that RMS value of 𝑣= 𝑉𝑚𝑆𝑖𝑛𝜔𝑡 is 𝑉𝑚 √2
Prove the power in purely inductive or purely capacitive circuit is 0, if supplied with a voltage supply of 𝑣= 𝑉𝑚𝑆𝑖𝑛𝜔𝑡
What is a PN Junction? Explain the formation of depletion layer in a PN junction
Compare Zener Breakdown and Avalanche Breakdown
What are the various operating mode of BJT?
Distinguish between holding and latching current.

questions.question_text: Find the voltage V0 across 20 Ohm resistance using superposition theorem?
Find Thevenin’s Equivalent circuit across AB. What value of Load should be connected across AB so that maximum power transfer takes place through it? What is the value of Maximum Power transferred? 2

Derive the expression of resonance frequency for a series RLC circuit, which is connected across an ac voltage source . Also draw the phasor diagram and derive the following: Total impedance Expression of current and Quality factor.

Draw the phasor-diagram of a circuit having two parallel branches, one having a series R-L circuit and the other having a series R-C circuit. Derive the condition of resonance and expression of resonance frequency.

subparts.text: Draw the Energy bands in intrinsic and extrinsic silicon.
Derive the diode current equation for p-n junction diode

questions.question_text: For the circuit shown below, determine the range of RL and IL that will result in VRL being maintained at 10V

subparts.text: Give and explain the current components of PNP transistor.

A transistor operating in CB configuration has IC = 2.98mA, IE = 3.00 mA and ICO =0.01 mA. What current will flow in the collector circuit for this transistor when connected in CE configuration with a base current of 30μA?

questions.question_text: With the help of neat diagram, explain the operation and characteristics of n-channel enhancement type MOSFET.
